title: FORGE Gate Decision Response
description: Schema for human responses to gate decision messages. Includes YubiKey HMAC-SHA1 mobile key signature for approval authentication.

gate_id.description: Gate ID echoed from the gate decision message

challenge_nonce.description: Challenge nonce echoed from the gate decision message

mobile_signature.description: HMAC-SHA1 signature from mobile key (keychain NFC YubiKey). Required for approve decisions.

mobile_key_id.description: Public identifier of the mobile key that signed this response

reason.description: Required for reject decisions. Human-provided reason for rejection.

query_type.description: Required for query decisions. Type of detail requested.

resume_at.description: Optional for defer decisions. When to re-present this gate.

channel_id.description: Source channel ID for channel binding verification

natural_language_patterns.description: Patterns for parsing natural language responses into structured decisions. Used by NanoClaw adapter, not for JSON validation.

approve.description: NFC tap triggers approve flow — no text pattern needed

examples: reject X7K9 tests don't cover edge case
